remove_all_prior_fog.description: If set to true, all previous fog definitions in resource packs before the current pack will be cleared, effectively making the current resource pack the new starting point for all fogs.

inherit_from_prior_fog.description: If set to true, the fog_identifier tags from all matching biomes will be combined and create a new merged fog definition for that biome.

color.description: A hexadecimal color code in the format #RRGGBB.
